trades.reasoning: United Airlines shows the full momentum trifecta (RSI 68.4, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20) and airline stocks are classic risk-on beneficiaries when consumer confidence is up.
Super Micro Computer rides the AI infrastructure buildout cycle; RSI 66.6 with rising MACD histogram signals momentum without being overbought, and the risk-on tape supports AI hardware names.
Carnival sits at RSI 69.3 — top of the bullish zone but not yet overbought — and cruise/leisure demand is structurally strong; risk-on days historically lift consumer discretionary leaders.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P 500 +0.8%, favouring cyclicals and growth names. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash, I'm adding three positions — UAL, SMCI, and CCL — all scoring 95 on the momentum screener with clean technical setups. The remaining slot is left empty given limited remaining cash after sizing these three; all six existing positions are held as none have triggered their stop-loss or profit targets.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities pushed higher on May 20 as easing trade tensions between the U.S. and major partners lifted risk sentiment broadly. Technology and AI-infrastructure stocks led the NASDAQ advance, while airlines and cruise operators surged on strong forward booking data pointing to a robust summer travel season. Semiconductor and data-centre supply-chain names also outperformed as institutional money rotated into cyclical growth.
market_education.summary_zh: 5月20日美股全面走強，美國與主要貿易夥伴的緊張關係緩和提振了市場風險情緒。科技及人工智能基礎設施股領漲納斯達克，航空及郵輪股則因夏季旅遊預訂數據強勁而大幅上揚。半導體及數據中心供應鏈類股同樣表現亮眼，機構資金積極輪動至周期性成長板塊。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing bets that stocks already trending upward will continue rising in the near term — price strength tends to attract more buyers, which reinforces the trend. Practitioners look for RSI in the 55–70 'sweet spot' (strong but not overbought) paired with a bullish MACD crossover to confirm the move has fuel left. Today's screener flagged 17 tickers scoring a perfect 95, all showing exactly this setup, making it a textbook momentum-driven session.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資的核心理念是：已處於上升趨勢的股票，短期內往往會繼續走高——價格強勢會吸引更多買盤，從而形成自我強化的趨勢。實務上，投資者會尋找RSI介於55至70的「甜蜜區間」（強勢但未過熱），並配合MACD出現看漲交叉，以確認動能尚有持續空間。今日篩選器共標記17隻評分達到滿分95的股票，全部呈現這一形態，可謂動能投資策略的典型示範日。
